LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHAU YU'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DISQUALIFYING COUNSEL LEONARD MASTROMONACO AND HIS LAW FIRM FROM REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. (SEE MINI-MINUTES THIS DATE FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Off Calendar

Mtn For Order Disqualifying Counsel Leonard Peter Mastromonaco And The Law Firm From Representing Deft'S In This Action
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHAU YU's Motion For Order Disqualifying Counsel Leonard Peter Mastomanaco #103859 And The Law Firm of Mastromonaco Real Property Law Group From Representing Defendants In This Action.

Plaintiff Chau Yu's motion for an order disqualifying counsel Leonard Mastromonaco and his law firm from representing the defendants is denied. Defendants' hearsay objections to the police reports are sustained. Because the police reports are the sole evidence supporting the motion, the motion must be denied.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
